description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gagan0123/php:7.0 Docker image and a mysql:5.6 service. Define variables MYSQL_DATABASE=wordpress_tests and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=mysql. Add a before_script that runs bash bin/install-wp-tests.sh wordpress_tests root mysql mysql latest true. In the default test stage add a job named PHPunit:PHP7.0:MySQL that executes phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml.dist. The pipeline has no additional artifacts, caches, or rules.
